<!--
  PR Title format: 🔧 chore(<scope>): <short description>
  Examples:
    🔧 chore(ci): update MegaLinter to v8
    👷 ci(workflows): add label sync schedule
    📦 build(deps): bump actions/checkout to v4
-->

## 🔧 Chore Description

<!-- What maintenance task, tooling update, or configuration change is this? -->

Related to #<!-- issue number (if any) -->

## Type

- [ ] 🔧 `chore` — Configuration, tooling, or repo maintenance
- [ ] 👷 `ci` — CI/CD pipeline changes
- [ ] 📦 `build` — Build system or dependency updates

## Scope

Scope: `<!-- e.g. ci, deps, labels, renovate, megalinter, prettier -->`

## Changes Made

-

## Testing

- [ ] Pipeline runs successfully
- [ ] No testing required

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title: `🔧 chore(<scope>): <description>` (or `👷 ci` / `📦 build` as appropriate)
- [ ] Labels applied: `chore` or `maintenance`
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] No secrets or credentials included
